prompt: Strict 90-degree overhead orthographic military-plan game terrain texture, square map patch, no horizon, no sky. Preserve the supplied river channel, shoreline, elevation masks, open walkable areas and every large rock mass exactly. Do not add paths, roads, trees, buildings, river branches, islands, cliffs, standing walls or new macro rocks. Original unbranded world art, no text, logo, watermark, tile seams, checkerboard patches or symmetry. Enrich the existing surfaces with moody dark-fantasy material depth: deep olive grass, charcoal wet earth, cool slate rocks, muted moss, silver river highlights, fine gravel and restrained low vegetation. High-definition painterly RPG terrain, strong but soft-edged value separation, cohesive overcast lighting, no black crush.
